name: Alcohol Screening Tool Codes
description: CPT, HCPCS, and LOINC codes for alcohol misuse screening using validated tools (AUDIT, AUDIT-C, CAGE, single-question screening). Used in the unhealthy alcohol use screening and brief counseling (ASC) measure.
source: Public CMS/clinical references — placeholder for official NCQA value sets
